allow: Bash(julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.status\(\); println\("---LOCAL---"\); cd\("C:/Users/nickg/Documents/18.337/FinalProject"\); try; Pkg.activate\("."\); Pkg.status\(\); catch e; println\(e\); end')
Bash(julia --project=. -e 'using Pkg; try; Pkg.add\("Gridap"\); println\("Gridap OK"\); catch e; println\("FAIL Gridap: ", e\); end')
Bash(julia --project=. -e 'using Pkg; for p in ["GridapGmsh","Gmsh","CairoMakie"]; try; Pkg.add\(p\); println\(p, " OK"\); catch e; println\("FAIL ",p,": ", e\); end; end')
Bash(julia --project=. -e 'using Pkg; for p in ["Gmsh","IJulia"]; try; Pkg.add\(p\); println\(p, " OK"\); catch e; println\("FAIL ",p,": ", e\); end; end')
